creator: tdb@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sun, May 06, 2012 at 02:10:08PM +0000, FreeBSD-gnats-submit@freebsd.org wrote:
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=167642
> 
> >Category:       ports
> >Responsible:    freebsd-ports-bugs
> >Synopsis:       [PATCH] textproc/augeas: Make Puppet lenses work on FreeBSD
> >Arrival-Date:   Sun May 06 14:10:08 UTC 2012

This has been patched upstream and I have a workaround to use until
then. So unless the maintainer is particularly keen to apply it, I'm
happy to close this PR and wait for the next release.

https://fedorahosted.org/augeas/ticket/279

Tim.

--
